scripts.deploy: npx expo prebuild --clean -p ios && xcodebuild -workspace ios/Vesture.xcworkspace -scheme Vesture -configuration Release -destination 'id=00008140-000C6D860082201C' -allowProvisioningUpdates -derivedDataPath /tmp/vesture-build -UseNewBuildSystem=NO && xcrun devicectl device install app --device 00008140-000C6D860082201C /tmp/vesture-build/Build/Products/Release-iphoneos/Vesture.app
scripts.deploy:dev: APP_VARIANT=development EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=${DEV_API_URL:-https://style-assistant-api-dev.onrender.com} EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=${DEV_SUPABASE_URL:-https://ktwzdsqhvsgnfjklrnlt.supabase.co} EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=${DEV_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY:-sb_publishable_yPoc_v95vd0YvITP3EDobQ_lyeNU3NV} EXPO_PUBLIC_USE_MOCK_SERVICES=false npx expo prebuild --clean -p ios && APP_VARIANT=development EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=${DEV_API_URL:-https://style-assistant-api-dev.onrender.com} EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=${DEV_SUPABASE_URL:-https://ktwzdsqhvsgnfjklrnlt.supabase.co} EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=${DEV_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY:-sb_publishable_yPoc_v95vd0YvITP3EDobQ_lyeNU3NV} EXPO_PUBLIC_USE_MOCK_SERVICES=false xcodebuild -workspace ios/VestureDev.xcworkspace -scheme VestureDev -configuration Release -destination 'id=00008140-000C6D860082201C' -allowProvisioningUpdates -derivedDataPath /tmp/vesture-dev-build -UseNewBuildSystem=NO && xcrun devicectl device install app --device 00008140-000C6D860082201C /tmp/vesture-dev-build/Build/Products/Release-iphoneos/VestureDev.app
